results.name: stirge
results.description: A bat/mosquito creature from Dungeons and Dragons

results.name: stock turn
results.description: Skip a turn now in exchange for an extra turn later.

results.name: storage land
results.description: Lands that can store up mana over time for later use.

results.name: storm count matters
results.description: Storm count is the number of spells cast in a turn, named for [the Storm mechanic](//scryfall.com/search?q=keyword%3Astorm). This tag tracks cards that care about that quantity, but also the number just any one player has cast.

results.name: storm-like
results.description: Cards exploring design space in the vicinity of the Storm mechanic. Maybe one of these will be the progenitor of a future fixed version of the mechanic?

results.name: stranger things
results.description: Art set in the Stranger Things universe.

results.name: stream
results.description: A body of water smaller than a river; unlike a river, you can definitely cross a stream on foot.

results.name: streamer
results.description: A strip of cloth, often attached to the end of a polearm or building

results.name: strive
results.description: Cards that require paying an additional cost per additional target.

results.name: stromkirk
results.description: A bloodline of vampires on Innistrad.

results.name: stuffy doll
results.description: A doll that has been tortured in various classic card arts, eventually getting its own card in Time Spiral

results.name: substance
results.description: Substance is an obsolete static ability that has no effect at all. It existed briefly only as a technical detail to support implementing a few cards in Magic Online's Mirage release.
